payment.subtitle: We use Paymob — Egypt's leading payment gateway — to process all subscriptions. Your financial data is fully encrypted and never stored on our servers.

testimonials.title: Trusted by growing teams
testimonials.subtitle: Real results from real companies across Egypt.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know before signing up.

items.q: Do I need to pay before trying the system?
items.a: No — you start with a free demo session. Our team walks you through the full system tailored to your team's size and needs. You only pay once you're fully satisfied and ready to onboard.

Book a 30-minute call with one of our product specialists. We'll show you the features most relevant to your business, answer every question you have, and set up a free trial environment for you to explore.

items.q: Can I add more employees later?
items.a: Yes. Our pricing scales with your headcount. Contact our team at any time and we'll adjust your plan instantly with no hidden fees.
All data is encrypted at rest (AES-256) and in transit (TLS 1.3). We are ISO 27001 certified and fully GDPR compliant. Enterprise clients can also opt for on-premise deployment.
We accept all major credit and debit cards, Meeza, Fawry, and bank transfers — all processed securely through Paymob, Egypt's leading payment gateway.

items.q: Is there a minimum commitment or contract?
items.a: No lock-in. The plan is billed monthly and you can cancel at any time. Annual billing is available at a discounted rate upon request.

cta.title: Ready to simplify your HR?
cta.subtitle: Book a free demo. No commitment, no credit card. Just 30 minutes to see if we're the right fit.
